Nature. Hungry
Explore Concepts About Make a Difference Useful Links

Plants of Singapore shores: text index

land plants text index | photo index - index of marine plants: seaweeds | seagrasses

seaweeds | seagrasses | mangroves | coastal plants Text index of land plants on Singapore shores
currently mainly mangroves, shores, coastal forests with some also found in other wild places.Don’t know the name of the plant? Try the plant photo index.

  Family Aizoaceae   Sesuvium portulacastrum (Gelang laut)

  Family Acanthaceae   Acanthus sp. (Jeruju) Acanthus ebracteatus (Jeruju hitam) (VU: Vulnerable)
Acanthus ilicifolius (Jeruju putih)
Acanthus volubilis (Jeruju) (VU: Vulnerable)
Avicennia in general Avicennia alba (Api-api putih)
Avicennia marina (Api-api jambu) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Avicennia officinalis (Api-api ludat)
Avicennia rumphiana (Api-api bulu)

  Family Amaryllidaceae   Crinum asiaticum (Bakung or Seashore spider lily) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Apocynaceae   Cerbera manghas (Pink-eyed pong pong tree) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Cerbera odollam (Yellow-eyed pong pong tree) (VU: Vulnerable)
Dischidia major (Mangrove ant-house plant)

Hoya sp. (Mangrove wax plant)

  Family Areceae (Palmae)   Areca catechu (Pinang palm or betel-nut palm)
Caryota mitis (Fishtail palm)
Nypa fruticans (Nipah palm) (VU: Vulnerable)

  Family Aspleniaceae   Asplenium nidus (Birds’ nest fern)

  Family Apocynaceae   Finlaysonia obovata (Kalak kambing) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Bignoniaceae   Dolichandrone spathacea (Tui or Mangrove trumpet tree) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Bombacaceae   Durio zibethinus (Durian)

  Family Caricaceae   Carica papaya (Papaya tree)

  Family Casuarinaceae   Casuarina equisetifolia (Rhu or Casuarina tree)

  Family Celastraceae   Cassine viburnifolia (Kempudang baran) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Clusiaceae   Calophyllum inophyllum (Penaga laut) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Calophyllum soulattri (Bintangor bunut) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Combretaceae   Lumnitzera littorea (Teruntum merah) (EN: Endangered)
Lumnitzera racemosa (Teruntum putih) (EN: Endangered) Terminalia catappa (Ketapang or Sea almond)

  Family Convolvulaceae   Ipomoea pes-caprae (Beach morning glory)

  Family Dilleniaceae   Dillenia suffruticosa (Simpoh air)

  Family Euphorbiaceae   Excoecaria agallocha (Buta-buta or Blind-your-eye)
Hevea brasiliensis (Rubber tree)
Suregada multiflora (Limau hantu)

  Family Fabaceae/Leguminosae   Adenanthera pavonina (Saga tree)
Caesalpinia bonduc (Bonduc) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Caesalpinia crista (Kuku tupai) (VU: Vulnerable)
Canavalia cathartica (Poisonous sea bean) Canavalia maritima (Sea bean)
Derris trifoliata (Common derris)
Desmodium umbellatum (Petai laut)
Flemingia strobilifera (Serengan)
Intsia bijuga (Ipil) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Leucaena leucocephala (Petai jawa)
Peltophorum pterocarpum (Yellow flame)
Pongamia pinnata (Mempari) (EN: Endangered)
Tamarindus indica (Asam or Tamarind tree)

  Family Flagellariaceae   Flagellaria indica (Rotan tikus)

  Family Goodeniaceae   Scaevola taccada (Merambong or Sea lettuce)

  Family Lamiaceae   Clerodendrum inerme (Gambir laut or Wild jasmine)

  Family Lauraceae   Cassytha filiformis (Rambut putri)

  Family Lecythidaceae   Barringtonia asiatica (Putat laut or Sea poison) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Barringtonia racemosa (Putat sungei) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Loganiaceae/Gentianaceae   Fagraea auriculata (Pelir musang) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Fagraea fragrans (Tembusu)
Fagraea racemosa (Sepuleh) (EN: Endangered)

  Family Lythraceae   Pemphis acidula (Mentigi) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Sonneratia in general Sonneratia alba (Perepat) Sonneratia caseolaris (Berembang) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Sonneratia ovata (Gedabu) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Malpighiaceae   Tristellateia australasiae (Maiden’s jealousy)

  Family Malvaceae   Brownlowia tersa (Dungun air) (EN: Endangered)
Heritiera littoralis (Dungun) (EN: Endangered)
Talipariti tiliaceus (Sea hibiscus)
Thespesia populnea (Baru-baru or Portia tree)

  Family Melastomataceae   Memecylon edule (Delek air) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Melastoma malabathricum (Senduduk)

  Family Meliaceae   Xylocarpus in general
Xylocarpus granatum (Nyireh bunga)
Xylocarpus moluccensis (Nyireh batu) (EN: Endangered)
Xylocarpus rumphii (Nyireh laut) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Moraceae   Artocarpus heterophyllus (Nangka)

Ficus in general (Figs)
Ficus benjamina (Waringin)
Ficus consociata (Brown-scurfy fig)
Ficus crassiramea (Collared fig)
Ficus elastica (India-rubber tree)
Ficus microcarpa (Jejawi)
Ficus variegata (Common red stem-fig)

  Family Myrtaceae   Psidium guajava (Guava tree) Melaleuca cajuputi (Gelam or Kayu putih)
Rhodomyrtus tomentosa (Kemunting)
Syzygium grande (Jambu air laut or Sea apple)
Syzygium malaccense (Jambu bol)
Syzygium zeylanicum (Kelat nasi nasi)

  Family Myristicaceae   Knema globularia (Seashore nutmeg) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Nepenthaceae   Nepenthes rafflesiana (Raffles’ pitcher plant) (VU: Vulnerable)

  Family Olacaceae   Ximenia americana (Bedara laut)

  Family Oxalidaceae   Averrhoa carambola (Star-fruit tree)

  Family Pandanaceae   Pandanus tectorius (Mengkuang or Seashore pandan)

  Family Pittosporaceae   Pittosporum ferrugineum (Belalang puak) (VU: Vulnerable)

  Family Podocarpaceae   Podocarpus polystachyus (Sea teak) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Polypodiaceae   Drymoglossum piloselloides (Dragon scales)

  Family Primulaceae   Aegiceras corniculatum (Kachang-kachang) (EN: Endangered)
Ardisia elliptica (Mata pelandok) (EN: Endangered)

  Family Pteridaceae   Acrostichum in general Acrostichum aureum (Piai raya)
Acrostichum speciosum (Piai lasa)

  Family Rhamnaceae   Colubrina asiatica (Peria laut)

  Family Rhizophoraceae

Bruguiera in general
Bruguiera cylindrica (Bakau putih)
Bruguiera gymnorrhiza (Tumu)
Bruguiera hainesii (Bakau mata buaya) (CR: Critically Endangered)

Bruguiera parviflora (Lenggadai) (EN: Endangered)
Bruguiera sexangula (Tumu berau) (CR: Critically Endangered)

Ceriops in general
Ceriops tagal (Tengar putih) (VU: Vulnerable)
Ceriops zippeliana (Tengar merah) (EN: Endangered)

Kandelia candel (Pisang-pisang) (CR: Critically Endangered)

Rhizophora in general
Rhizophora apiculata (Bakau minyak)
Rhizophora mucronata (Bakau kurap)
Rhizophora stylosa (Bakau pasir) (VU: Vulnerable)

  Family Rubiaceae   Coffea sp. (Coffee)
Guettarda speciosa (Ketapang pasir or Beach gardenia)
Ixora congesta (Jarum-jarum)
Morinda citrifolia (Noni or Mengkudu) Morinda umbellata (Menguku akar) Scyphiphora hydrophyllacea (Chengam)

  Family Rutaceae   Merope angulata (Limau lelang) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Sapindaceae   Allophylus cobbe (Tit-berry)

  Family Sapotaceae   Manilkara zapota (Chiku)
Pouteria linggensis (Nyatoh) (CR: Critically Endangered)
Pouteria obovata (Misi or Sea gutta)

  Family Simaroubaceae   Eurycoma longifolia (Tongkat Ali) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Sterculiaceae   Theobroma cacao (Chocolate tree)

  Family Taccaceae   Tacca leontopetaloides (Seashore bat lily) (CR: Critically Endangered)

  Family Theaceae   Adinandra dumosa (Tiup-tiup)

  Family Verbenaceae   Clerodendrum inerme (Gambir laut or Wild jasmine)
Premna corymbosa (Buas buas)

in red are those listed among the threatened plants of Singapore from Davison, G.W. H. and P. K. L. Ng and Ho Hua Chew, 2008. The Singapore Red Data Book: Threatened plants and animals of Singapore.
